title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Hardoi Jilla Sahkari Bank Ltd., Uttar Pradesh
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated April 21, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹1 lakh (Rupees One lakh only) on Hardoi Jilla Sahkari Bank Ltd., Uttar Pradesh (the bank) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Know Your Customer (KYC)’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of Section 47A(1)(c) read with Sections 46(4)(i) and 56 of the Banking Regulation Act.
